cards.back: A data structure that maps words to their locations in a document or a set of documents
A data structure used to efficiently search for occurrences of a pattern in a text by storing the positions of the pattern in a file
A tree-like data structure that presents all the suffixes of a given string in a way that allows for efficient string matching and pattern searching
An array that contains all the starting positions of the suffixes of a given string, used for efficient string matching and pattern searching

cards.front: What is a suffix array used for?
cards.back: For efficient string matching and pattern searching, as well as for tasks such as finding all occurrences of a pattern in a text
